content: [Phase 1] Add WiGLE API credential fields to settings.html with encryption helpers
[Phase 2] Create wigleAPI.js client with search methods and credential management
[Phase 3] Add Network Intelligence tab to case-detail.html module config and UI
[Phase 4] Implement map visualization with Leaflet markers and clustering
[Phase 5] Add timeline component and details table rendering
[Phase 5] Implement query history save/load with localStorage persistence
